| sh.url: Suspicious: piping output directly to a shell can execute arbitrary code. Review the source before executing.

| bash.url: Suspicious: piping output directly to bash can execute arbitrary code. Review the source before executing.

wget -O -.url: Suspicious: piping wget output directly to a shell can execute arbitrary code. Review the source before executing.

eval $(.url: Suspicious: eval can execute arbitrary code from command substitution. Ensure the source is trusted.

sudo.url: Suspicious: command uses sudo for elevated privileges. Verify you understand what will be executed.

ssh.url: Suspicious: SSH connection to remote host. Verify the destination is correct and trusted.

scp.url: Suspicious: SCP transfers files to/from remote hosts. Verify the destination and file paths.

nc.url: Suspicious: netcat can create network connections for data transfer. Verify the usage is legitimate.

ncat.url: Suspicious: ncat can create network connections for data transfer. Verify the usage is legitimate.
